description: Agent 5 utility route/status metadata for RmlUi utility and tooling surfaces.

status_values.scaffolded_round2: Second-round starter RML document exists in Agent 5-owned assets and preserves representative command, keybind, and cvar metadata from worr.json.
status_values.live_provider: The route has a native live provider plus installed OpenGL runtime evidence; full renderer/parity gates remain open.

migration_phase_values.starter: Source RML document and static route metadata exist; runtime, controller, and parity evidence are pending.
migration_phase_values.controller_stub: Controller/data-model stub metadata exists, but live runtime validation is pending.
migration_phase_values.runtime_stub: Runtime smoke/open path exists for this route, but parity evidence is pending.
migration_phase_values.parity_pending: Route opens through RmlUi with live bridge coverage; parity evidence is still incomplete.
migration_phase_values.parity_ready: Route has accepted parity evidence and is ready for cutover consideration.

controller_contracts.notes: The generic native form bridge hydrates and immediately persists archived adr0 through adr15 fields.
Browse and back dispatch through the live command listener.
Browse passes favorites, saved-file, and broadcast sources into the live server route; back uses the guarded route stack.

routes.notes: Live native archived-cvar provider and installed seeded 960x720 OpenGL capture accepted on 2026-07-13. The central migration phase remains controller_stub until native Vulkan/RTX and broader action automation evidence is accepted.

controller_contracts.notes: The native controller hydrates primary and alternate bindings, device icons, per-slot capture/clear, an eight-second timeout, and confirm-before-replace conflicts.
Legacy Keys and back controls dispatch through the live command listener.
Legacy Keys and back navigation dispatch through the live guarded route stack.

routes.notes: Live native two-slot keybind provider and installed 960x720 OpenGL capture accepted on 2026-07-13. The central migration phase remains controller_stub until native Vulkan/RTX and broader action automation evidence is accepted.

controller_contracts.notes: The native controller hydrates primary and alternate legacy bindings, device icons, per-slot capture/clear, timeout, and conflict confirmation.
Back dispatches through the live guarded route stack.

routes.notes: Live native two-slot legacy-key provider and installed 960x720 OpenGL capture accepted on 2026-07-13. The central migration phase remains controller_stub until native Vulkan/RTX and broader action automation evidence is accepted.

controller_contracts.notes: The native controller hydrates primary and alternate weapon bindings, device icons, per-slot capture/clear, timeout, and conflict confirmation.
Back dispatches through the live guarded route stack.

routes.notes: Live native two-slot weapon-key provider and installed 960x720 OpenGL capture accepted on 2026-07-13. The central migration phase remains controller_stub until native Vulkan/RTX and broader action automation evidence is accepted.

controller_contracts.notes: Refresh, source, connect, paging, sorting, row activation, and back controls dispatch through the live runtime.
The native provider hydrates live discovery, status, sorting, paging, selection, connect, and error rows before display.

routes.notes: Live native provider and populated/empty installed OpenGL captures accepted on 2026-07-13. The central migration phase remains controller_stub until route-specific cross-renderer parity evidence is modeled and accepted.

controller_contracts.notes: Directory, refresh, source, paging, sorting, playback, and back controls dispatch through the live runtime.
The native provider hydrates filesystem discovery, metadata, directories, sorting, paging, playback, and status totals before display.

routes.notes: Live native provider and two byte-identical populated installed OpenGL captures accepted on 2026-07-13. The central migration phase remains controller_stub until route-specific cross-renderer parity evidence is modeled and accepted.

controller_contracts.notes: Name, dogtag, and weapon-hand controls write live cvars immediately; the native provider enumerates model/skin pairs, initializes the composite skin userinfo value, updates it on selection changes, and drives selected-skin/dogtag image previews.
The standard topbar and document-aware backplate dispatch through the live runtime; player configuration uses immediate persistence and therefore has no inert Apply or Reset footer.

The native client preview owns the authored surface rect and renders model/skin, attached weapon discovery, staged animations, weapon switching, muzzle flash, and reduced-motion behavior through RDF_NOWORLDMODEL.

routes.notes: Live native Player Setup provider, immediate cvar persistence, live skin/dogtag PCX thumbnails, authored loading/empty/error states, staged 3D preview, cached scrap-atlas UV support, automated contract coverage, and installed seeded OpenGL capture accepted on 2026-07-13. The central migration phase remains controller_stub until route-specific cross-renderer parity evidence is modeled and accepted.

controller_contracts.notes: The compiled runtime refreshes owner-published ui_list labels, status, visibility, enablement, and paging cvars every frame.
Extra, item, and pagination actions dispatch through fixed commands or owner-published command cvars; the standard backplate runs the document close side effect.
Runtime conditions hide unused toolbar and paging slabs, disable actionless controls, and select the loading, empty, error, or ready presentation.
Sgame publishes eight-row pages plus explicit state/status cvars while clearing all twelve compatibility slots on every refresh.

routes.notes: Live sgame-published provider and installed populated, empty, and error OpenGL captures accepted on 2026-07-13. The central migration phase remains controller_stub until route-specific cross-renderer parity evidence is modeled and accepted.
